## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss reporting improvements, email workflows, and operational processes for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Implement Zapier integration for email workflows to improve visibility and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Address vacation coverage and calendar management for the sales team](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Begin discussions on revenue tracking and deal management solutions](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Establish a process for reviewing pipeline quality and meeting effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)

## Topics

### Email Workflow Improvements

  - [Current limitation: Adio only allows 12 sequences per hour](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Solution: Use Zapier to send emails from Owen and CC the sales alias](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Will implement for both disqualified (DQ) and did-not-book emails](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Joe to set up Zapier integration once given access to OnePass](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

### Vacation Coverage

  - [Kyle out on 15th, 16th, and 19th; Marcel to cover](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Joe to work with Alice to ensure Marcel has available time blocks](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Need to update calendar visibility and booking links](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)

### Revenue Tracking and Deal Management

  - [Explored options with Pandadoc and Maple for revenue recognition](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Current strategy: Let Kyle experience pain points before deciding on a solution](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [Potential shift to HubSpot CRM may impact decision](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Need to address upsell motion and expansion tracking](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

### Reporting and Pipeline Management

  - [Kyle needs clarity on current pipeline age, quality, and progression](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Aim to optimize Kyle's time on high-quality meetings](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Joe to build custom reports in Google Sheets if Adio's reporting is limited](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to review data and refine reporting needs](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Discussed incoming team member Andy and her potential responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Client ops role to focus on team onboarding, process execution, and feedback loops](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Emphasis on finding adaptable team members who can problem-solve independently](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joe to implement Zapier integration for email workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

  - [Joe and Kyle to meet on Monday at 1-1:30 PM to review initial data and reporting needs](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Kyle to provide additional insights or notes before the weekend for Joe's review](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [Continue discussions on revenue tracking and deal management solutions](https://fathom.video/share/ZmyVMXCzxL3xzfN163dWQQKHsgE4-H2i?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
